questionText: Break down your organization's financed emissions and other portfolio carbon footprinting metrics by asset class, by industry, and/or by scope.
questionKo: 금융배출량 및 기타 포트폴리오 탄소발자국 지표를 자산군, 산업 및/또는 범위별로 구분하십시오.
simpleHelp: Current methodologies for calculating portfolio emissions can lead to double counting across scopes. Breaking down absolute emissions and/or other carbon footprinting metrics of a portfolio by scope can help financial institutions identify emissions throughout the value chain of companies in their portfolio. Reporting at this level can provide a useful indicator for making comparisons between your financial activities in different industries. Furthermore, breaking down emissions and other carbon footprinting and/or exposure metrics by asset class can give an indication of the relative GHG emissions performance and/or exposure to climate-related risks of your company's assets. When reported over time, your organization and data users will be able to review improvements or declines in asset performance with considerations for your portfolio's impact on the climate.

columns.text: Value of assets covered in the calculation based on outstanding loan amounts
columns.textKo: 가치 의 assets 포함된 산정 based outstanding loan amounts

columns.text: Value of assets covered in the calculation including undrawn loan commitments
columns.textKo: 가치 의 assets 포함된 산정 포함 undrawn loan commitments

columns.text: Explain the details, assumptions and exclusions in your calculation
columns.textKo: 설명 세부 정보, assumptions 및 exclusions 귀사의 산정

options: Energy consumption (GWh/Million revenue of investee company)
optionsKo: 에너지 consumption (GWh/Million revenue 의 투자대상 comp하나 이상)

columns.text: % of asset class emissions calculated in the reporting year based on total value of assets
columns.textKo: % 의 자산군 배출량 산정d 보고연도 based total 가치 의 assets

columns.text: Value of assets covered in the calculation
Are you able to provide the gross exposure for your undrawn loan commitment separately from the drawn loan commitment?
columns.textKo: 귀사 able 제공 gross exposure 귀사의 undrawn loan commitment separately 에서 drawn loan commitment?

guidance.text: This question only appears if you select "Yes, by asset class", "Yes, by industry", or "Yes, by scope" in column 1 "Portfolio breakdown" of 12.2.
guidance.textKo: 이 문항 only appears 만약 귀사 선택 "예, 기준 자산군", "예, 기준 industry", 또는 "예, 기준 scope" 열 1 "포트폴리오 breakdown" 의 12.2.

guidance.text:
General 
Add a row for each portfolio for which you are able to provide a breakdown of your organization's portfolio impact. 
If you are able to provide a breakdown of multiple scopes for a single portfolio, industry or asset class, add a separate row for each scope . 
Portfolio metric (column 2) 
Disclose the quantitative emissions associated with the respective scope, industry and/or asset class. 
For details on methodologies to calculate portfolio metrics please consult the CDP Technical Note on Portfolio Impact Metrics for Financial Services Sector Companies . 
If you are reporting absolute emissions or emissions intensity, use gross, not net figures. For funded amounts, gross exposure shall be calculated as the funded carrying amounts (before subtracting the loss allowance, when applicable), whether prepared in accordance with IFRS Accounting Standards or other GAAP. 
Industry (column 3) 
Select from the drop-down list the industry for which you are able to disclose a figure for, adding one row for each industry.  
Asset class (column 4) 
Select from the drop-down list the asset classes that you are able to disclose a figure for. 
Add a row for each asset class for which you can disclose a figure by using the "Add Row" button at the bottom of the table. 
If there are other asset classes for which you are able to disclose a figure for but are not listed in the drop-down list, select "Other, please specify" and disclose the asset class. 
If you are disclosing emissions for each industry by asset class, make sure to indicate the industry for which you are reporting in column 2 "Industry". 
% of asset class emissions calculated in the reporting year based on total value of assets (column 6) 
This column is only presented if you are providing a breakdown of your emissions on asset class level. 
Provide the proportion of the asset class covered by the emissions calculation based on the total value of this asset class. 
Value of assets covered in the calculation (column 7) 
Provide the value of the assets covered by the emissions calculation. 
All values should be reported in the currency selected in 1.2. 
Value of assets covered in the calculation based on outstanding loan amounts (column 10) 
Disclose the full amount of the commitment separately from the drawn portion of loan commitments included in the emissions calculation. 
All values should be reported in the currency selected in 1.2. 
Value of assets covered in the calculation including undrawn loan commitments (column 11) 
Disclose the full amount of the commitment separately from the drawn portion of loan commitments included in the emissions calculation. 
For undrawn loan commitments, calculate the percentage by dividing the full amount of undrawn loan commitments to carbon related industries by the full amount of undrawn loan commitments to all industries. 
All values should be reported in the currency selected in 1.2. 
Explain the details, assumptions and exclusions in your calculation (column 12) 
If you are not able to provide the emissions value for all of the scopes (Scope 1, Scope 2, Scope 3) for each of your asset classes or industries, explain why you are not able to. 
For your scope 2 financed emissions, explain if market-based and/or location-based method has been used. 
Explain how any methodological changes have influenced the calculation of financed emissions. Note that emissions methodology changes should be disclosed in questions 7.1-7.1.2.

Add 행 each 자산군 귀사 할 수 있습니다 공시 수치 기준 using "Add 행" button at bottom 의 table. 만약 there 기타 자산군 귀사 able 공시 수치 but 아니요t listed drop-down list, 선택 "기타, 직접 입력" 및 공시 자산군. 만약 귀사 disclosing 배출량 each industry 기준 자산군, make sure indicate industry 귀사 보고ing 열 2 "Industry". % 의 자산군 배출량 산정d 보고연도 based total 가치 의 assets (열 6) 이 열 only presented 만약 귀사 providing breakdown 의 귀사의 배출량 자산군 level. 제공 proportion 의 자산군 포함된 기준 배출량 산정 based total 가치 의 이 자산군. 가치 의 assets 포함된 산정 (열 7) 제공 가치 의 assets 포함된 기준 배출량 산정. 모든 values 해야 합니다 보고된 currency 선택됨 1.2. 가치 의 assets 포함된 산정 based outstanding loan amounts (열 10) 공시 full amount 의 commitment separately 에서 drawn portion 의 loan commitments 포함된 배출량 산정. 모든 values 해야 합니다 보고된 currency 선택됨 1.2. 가치 의 assets 포함된 산정 포함 undrawn loan commitments (열 11) 공시 full amount 의 commitment separately 에서 drawn portion 의 loan commitments 포함된 배출량 산정. undrawn loan commitments, 산정 percentage 기준 dividing full amount 의 undrawn loan commitments carbon related industries 기준 full amount 의 undrawn loan commitments 모든 industries. 모든 values 해야 합니다 보고된 currency 선택됨 1.2. 설명 세부 정보, assumptions 및 exclusions 귀사의 산정 (열 12) 만약 귀사 아니요t able 제공 배출량 가치 모든 의 scopes (Scope 1, Scope 2, Scope 3) each 의 귀사의 자산군 또는 industries, 설명 why 귀사 아니요t able. 귀사의 scope 2 금융배출량, 설명 만약 시장-based 및/또는 location-based method has used. 설명 how 하나 이상 methodological changes have influenced 산정 의 금융배출량. 아니요te 배출량 방법론 changes 해야 합니다 공시된 문항 7.1-7.1.2.

guidance.text:
Financial institutions disclose absolute gross financed emissions, disaggregated by Scope 1, Scope 2 and Scope 3 greenhouse gas emissions. 
Financial institutions report gross exposure to each industry by asset class, expressed in the presentation currency of the entity's financial statements. 
Funded amounts-gross exposure shall be calculated as the funded carrying amounts (before subtracting the loss allowance, when applicable), whether prepared in accordance with IFRS Accounting Standards or other GAAP. 
Undrawn loan commitments-the entity shall disclose the full amount of the commitment separately from the drawn portion of loan commitments.
guidance.textKo: 재무 institutions 공시 absolute gross 금융배출량, disaggregated 기준 Scope 1, Scope 2 및 Scope 3 온실가스 배출량. 재무 institutions 보고 gross exposure each industry 기준 자산군, expressed presentation currency 의 entity's 재무 명시ments. Funded amounts-gross exposure sh모든 산정d funded carrying amounts (before subtracting loss 모든owance, 경우 applicable), whether prepared accordance IFRS Accounting Standards 또는 기타 GAAP. Undrawn loan commitments- entity sh모든 공시 full amount 의 commitment separately 에서 drawn portion 의 loan commitments.

guidance.text: Gross emissions: GHGs emitted into the atmosphere before accounting for offsets or credits that have reduced or compensated for emissions.
guidance.textKo: 총배출량: GHGs emitted into atmosphere before accounting offsets 또는 credits have reduced 또는 compensated 배출량.

criteria.criteria:
Points will be awarded per completed cell in proportion to the number of rows disclosed as follows:
Any of the following columns completed per row:
- 'Asset Class'
- 'Industry'
- 'Clients'/investees' scope
A maximum of 3/3 points is available for this question.
criteria.criteriaKo: 점 부여됨 per 완료 셀 proportion 숫자 입력 의 행 공시된 follows: 하나 이상 의 다음 열 완료 per 행: - '자산군' - 'Industry' - '고객'/투자대상' scope 이 문항에서 최대 3/3점을 받을 수 있습니다.

criteria.criteria:
Full Disclosure points awarded AND
At least one option selected in column 'Portfolio' per row where 'Yes…' is selected in column 'Portfolio breakdown' in question 12.2 - 1 point
A maximum of 1/1 point is available for this question.
criteria.criteriaKo: Full 공시 점수수수 부여됨 및 At least one 선택지 열에서 선택 '포트폴리오' per 행 경우 '예…' 열에서 선택 '포트폴리오 breakdown' 문항 12.2 - 1 점 이 문항에서 최대 1/1점을 받을 수 있습니다.

simpleHelpKo: 현재 방법론 calculating 포트폴리오 배출량 할 수 있습니다 lead double counting across scopes. Breaking down absolute 배출량 및/또는 기타 carbon footprinting 지표 의 포트폴리오 기준 scope 할 수 있습니다 help 재무 institutions 식별 배출량 throughout 가치사슬 의 기업 their 포트폴리오. 보고ing at 이 level 할 수 있습니다 제공 useful indicator making comparisons between 귀사의 재무 활동 different industries. Furthermore, breaking down 배출량 및 기타 carbon footprinting 및/또는 exposure 지표 기준 자산군 할 수 있습니다 give indication 의 relative GHG 배출량 performance 및/또는 exposure 기후-related 리스크 의 귀사의 comp하나 이상's assets. 경우 보고된 over time, 귀사 및 데이터 users able review improvements 또는 declines asset performance considerations 귀사의 포트폴리오's 영향 기후.
